retroactive_note: Retroactive sidecar created 2026-04-29 to satisfy the new Tier 2.9 reasoning-sidecar policy. The crop itself was drafted manually before the auto-pipeline existed (commit 5831ef8). Source-to-section confidence mapping is reconstructed at section level only; per-claim mapping is not available for pre-pipeline crops.

1_thailand_applicability.rationale: DOA seed-production manual + multiple Thai ag-media sources confirm cultivation across all Thai regions

2_climate.rationale: Cross-validated by DOA + UMN Extension + Old Farmer's Almanac

3_soil.rationale: pH range and texture preferences from UMN Extension + commercial cultivation reference; Thailand-applicability note added

5_planting.rationale: DOA seed-production guide + Thai farmer practice (รักบ้านเกิด, บ้านและสวน)

6_care.rationale: General principles only; chemical fertilizer specifics intentionally omitted per SAFETY_POLICY

7_pests_diseases.rationale: DOA disease-data PDF + Tab Innovation reference; chemical control specifics intentionally omitted

8_harvest.rationale: Multiple Thai practical sources agree on timing and method

9_economics.rationale: General market context only; no specific income figures (per SAFETY_POLICY)

11_foreign_knowledge.rationale: Nature Scientific Reports + NCBI/PMC for hydroponic and chemotype data; explicitly flagged as NOT directly applicable to Thai context

overall_rationale: Multiple Thai government + university extension + peer-reviewed sources cover all critical sections. See the source table in src/content/crops/sweet-basil.mdx §12 for the full citation list.
